title: Lab Lite
description: A lightweight modpack with performance optimizations and a minimap — low-end device friendly and ready to play in minutes.
body:
# Lab Lite: A Lightweight Pack
Lab Lite is a lightweight modpack designed for quick local multiplayer and low‑end systems.
It stays close to vanilla Minecraft while polishing performance, stability, and ease of use!
## Features
- Ultra‑lightweight
Only essential API and optimization mods are included. No bloat, small download size, ready to go.

- Smooth performance
Bundled with Sodium, Lithium, and other modern optimization mods to boost FPS and reduce stutter. Runs well even on integrated graphics.
 
- Out‑of‑box LAN play
Xaero's Minimap is pre‑installed for easy teammate tracking; default settings are tuned for hassle‑free local multiplayer.

- Optional visuals
Iris Shaders is included. If your hardware allows, you can add shader packs to enhance the look of the game.

## Ideal for
- Older laptops or low‑spec PCs
- Quick LAN sessions with friends
- Players who want a vanilla feel with better performance
